install.title: Install DAP on your phone
install.description: Quick access to your dashboard, reminders when your weekly module opens, no need to go through the browser.

push.notSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
push.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured on this site yet.
push.permissionBlocked: Permission blocked. Enable it manually from your browser settings.
push.permissionNeeded: We need your permission to send you notifications.
push.subscribeSuccess: Done — we'll notify you when your module opens.

Toast.alreadySubscribed: You already have an active subscription.
Toast.phaseLocked: You don't have access to this phase yet. It unlocks every 2 months of subscription.
Toast.moduleCompleted: Module completed! Move on to the next one.
Toast.phaseCompleted: Phase completed! You'll receive your dimension soon.
Toast.threadClosed: Thread closed. It no longer accepts replies.
Toast.communityNeedsSub: The community is only for active DAP subscribers.
